name: 3rd Invasion - Zombies vs. Steel
short_description: In this game Strategy is the key to Survival. You need a Grand Strategy to win this War game, A RTS action game with an Cool, Open-World like Base Building feature.
detailed_description:
In this game Strategy is the key to Survival.

You need a Grand Strategy to win this War game,

A RTS action game with an Cool, Open-World like Base Building feature.

Build your base to helping you to fight a war against Armies of Zombies, Aliens and a Plant-based intelligence.

Normal RTS have just a simple Strategy, but this has another layer of Difficult, making plans for a Grand Strategy, setting this Singleplayer game apart.

You win a battle in one spot, but the enemies attack another spot, just like in a real war of Survival.

These are the units under your command.

Each War might might bring you closer to victory, but using the wrong Strategy, and you might lose the War. You need a Grand Strategy to win this RTS.

Using Base Building to protect your army, as you plan your next raid into the enemy area.

When the fighting begins, and your army rolls into Action, You alone have the Strategy to win.

The Enemies:

Zombies just attack, with no real Strategy. Their Base Building is simple, with little defenses.

The Plants, also lacks any Strategy, but they are good at Base Building, and hard to kill.

The Aliens have a Grand Strategy, and advance base building, with strong Defenses..

The map:

This RTS war game, has 30 maps; Some give you new weapons, others more money.

The wrong Strategy will get you fighting in some lost desert, will the Zombies and Aliens kill of the large cities... draining you for money.
